top_signals.title: This is the greatest time ever for semiconductors, says CEO of key equipment supplier
top_signals.summary: Applied Materials CEO Gary Dickerson said the semiconductor industry is experiencing its strongest period ever.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong: On Track to Meet or Exceed 2026 Visitor Target
top_signals.summary: Rosanna Law, Hong Kong's Secretary for Culture, Sports and Tourism, says the city is on track to reach its 53.8 million visitor arrivals target for 2026 and is currently running slightly ahead. She speaks with Yvonne Man and David Ingles on Bloomberg: The China Show (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Boston Dynamics' Schulman on US Robotics Strategy
top_signals.summary: Brendan Schulman,  Vice President of Policy and Government Relations at Boston Dynamics, discusses his view on how the US government and firms should approach the development of robotics technology, and the competition on deploying such technology in other countries like China and Japan. He speaks on the sidelines of the Tokyo Humanoids Summit on "Bloomberg: The China Show" (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Alpac Capital Agrees to Buy Adria News Network From United Group
top_signals.summary: Alpac Capital agreed to buy Adria News Network, which has news assets in Bosnia, Croatia, Montenegro, Serbia and Slovenia, from United Group BV, according to a statement released Friday.
